description_long: This is a four-door sedan police car painted in a two-tone blue color scheme, with a lighter blue on the hood, roof, and trunk, and a darker blue on the sides. The vehicle features a prominent red and blue light bar mounted on the roof, and the words 'STATE POLICE' are clearly marked in white on the front doors and rear. The number '911' is displayed on the rear quarter panels, indicating emergency services. The car has black wheels with silver hubcaps, tinted windows, and a chrome front grille. Additional details include a black square on the front passenger door and a police insignia on the rear driver-side door.
description: A blue and light blue state police sedan with a roof-mounted red and blue light bar, 'STATE POLICE' markings, and emergency number '911' on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing 'STATE POLICE' text, '911' on the rear, a black square on the front door, and the roof light bar.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the chrome grille, dual red lights on the roof, and the car's wide windshield.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a visible police insignia on the rear door, '911' on the rear, and the light bar on the roof.
description_view_3: Rear view showing 'STATE POLICE' text on the trunk, taillights, and the back of the roof light bar.
attribute_police_markings: White 'STATE POLICE' text on both front doors and rear trunk, '911' in white on both rear quarter panels, and a black square on the front passenger door. The rear driver-side door features a police insignia. All markings are in bold, sans-serif font.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with two red lights, one on each side, and a blue section in the center. The lights are rectangular and positioned centrally on the roof.
attribute_police_insignia: A police insignia is visible on the rear driver-side door, featuring a shield design with blue, white, and yellow elements.
